briefdescription.para: Macro to do a casting from an object pointer to a function pointer without encountering a warning from gcc.

detaileddescription.para: #define XML_CAST_FPTR(fptr) (*(void **)(&fptr)) This macro violated ISO C aliasing rules (gcc4 on s390 broke) so it is disabled now

briefdescription.para: Hash table mapping strings to pointers.

detaileddescription.para: Also supports lookup using two or three strings as key.

briefdescription.para: Callback to free data from a hash.
Callback to copy data from a hash.

simplesect.para: a copy of the data or NULL in case of error.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* xmlHashScanner) (void *payload, void *data, const xmlChar *name)
memberdef.name: xmlHashScanner

briefdescription.para: Callback when scanning data in a hash with the simple scanner.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* xmlHashScannerFull) (void *payload, void *data, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *name2, const xmlChar *name3)
memberdef.argsstring: )(void *payload, void *data, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *name2, const xmlChar *name3)
memberdef.name: xmlHashScannerFull

briefdescription.para: Callback when scanning data in a hash with the full scanner.
Create a new hash table.

detaileddescription.para: Set size to zero if the number of entries can't be estimated.

parameterdescription.para: initial size of the hash table

simplesect.para: the newly created object, or NULL if a memory allocation failed.

briefdescription.para: Create a new hash table backed by a dictionary.

detaileddescription.para: This can reduce resource usage considerably if most keys passed to API functions originate from this dictionary.

parameterdescription.para: the size of the hash table
a dictionary to use for the hash

simplesect.para: the newly created object, or NULL if a memory allocation failed.

briefdescription.para: Free the hash and its contents.

detaileddescription.para: The payload is deallocated with dealloc if provided.

briefdescription.para: Free a hash table entry with xmlFree.
Add a hash table entry.

detaileddescription.para: If an entry with this key already exists, payload will not be updated and 0 is returned. This return value can't be distinguished from out-of-memory errors, so this function should be used with care.

simplesect.para: 1 on success, 0 if an entry exists and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Add a hash table entry.

detaileddescription.para: If an entry with this key already exists, payload will not be updated and -1 is returned. This return value can't be distinguished from out-of-memory errors, so this function should be used with care.
NOTE: This function doesn't allow to distinguish malloc failures from existing entries. Use xmlHashAdd instead.

simplesect.para: 0 on success and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Add a hash table entry.

detaileddescription.para: If an entry with this key already exists, the old payload will be freed and updated with the new value.

parameterdescription.para: deallocator function for replaced item or NULL

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success, -1 if a memory allocation failed.

briefdescription.para: Add a hash table entry with two strings as key.

detaileddescription.para: See xmlHashAdd.

simplesect.para: 1 on success, 0 if an entry exists and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Add a hash table entry with two strings as key.

detaileddescription.para: See xmlHashAddEntry.

simplesect.para: 0 on success and -1 in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlHashTable *hash, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *name2, void *userdata, xmlHashDeallocator dealloc)
memberdef.name: xmlHashUpdateEntry2

briefdescription.para: Add a hash table entry with two strings as key.

detaileddescription.para: See xmlHashUpdateEntry.

parameterdescription.para: deallocator function for replaced item or NULL

simplesect.para: 0 on success and -1 in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlHashTable *hash, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *name2, const xmlChar *name3, void *userdata)
memberdef.name: xmlHashAdd3

briefdescription.para: Add a hash table entry with three strings as key.

detaileddescription.para: See xmlHashAdd.

simplesect.para: 1 on success, 0 if an entry exists and -1 in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlHashTable *hash, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *name2, const xmlChar *name3, void *userdata)
memberdef.name: xmlHashAddEntry3

briefdescription.para: Add a hash table entry with three strings as key.

detaileddescription.para: See xmlHashAddEntry.

simplesect.para: 0 on success and -1 in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlHashTable *hash, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *name2, const xmlChar *name3, void *userdata, xmlHashDeallocator dealloc)
memberdef.name: xmlHashUpdateEntry3

briefdescription.para: Add a hash table entry with three strings as key.

detaileddescription.para: See xmlHashUpdateEntry.

parameterdescription.para: deallocator function for replaced item or NULL

simplesect.para: 0 on success and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Find the entry specified by the key and remove it from the hash table.

detaileddescription.para: Payload will be freed with dealloc.

parameterdescription.para: deallocator function for removed item or NULL

simplesect.para: 0 on success and -1 if no entry was found.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlHashTable *hash, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *name2, xmlHashDeallocator dealloc)
memberdef.name: xmlHashRemoveEntry2

briefdescription.para: Remove an entry with two strings as key.

detaileddescription.para: See xmlHashRemoveEntry.

parameterdescription.para: deallocator function for removed item or NULL

simplesect.para: 0 on success and -1 in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlHashTable *hash, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *name2, const xmlChar *name3, xmlHashDeallocator dealloc)
memberdef.name: xmlHashRemoveEntry3

briefdescription.para: Remove an entry with three strings as key.

detaileddescription.para: See xmlHashRemoveEntry.

parameterdescription.para: deallocator function for removed item or NULL

simplesect.para: 0 on success and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Find the entry specified by key.

simplesect.para: a pointer to the payload or NULL if no entry was found.

briefdescription.para: Find the payload specified by the (key, key2) tuple.

simplesect.para: a pointer to the payload or NULL if no entry was found.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlHashTable *hash, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *name2, const xmlChar *name3)
memberdef.name: xmlHashLookup3

briefdescription.para: Find the payload specified by the (key, key2, key3) tuple.

simplesect.para: a pointer to the payload or NULL if no entry was found.

briefdescription.para: Find the payload specified by the QName prefix:name or name.

parameterdescription.para: local name of the string key

simplesect.para: a pointer to the payload or NULL if no entry was found.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlHashTable *hash, const xmlChar *prefix, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *prefix2, const xmlChar *name2)
memberdef.name: xmlHashQLookup2

briefdescription.para: Find the payload specified by the QNames tuple.

simplesect.para: a pointer to the payload or NULL if no entry was found.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlHashTable *hash, const xmlChar *prefix, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *prefix2, const xmlChar *name2, const xmlChar *prefix3, const xmlChar *name3)
memberdef.name: xmlHashQLookup3

briefdescription.para: Find the payload specified by the QNames tuple.

simplesect.para: a pointer to the payload or NULL if no entry was found.

detaileddescription.para:
hash
hash table
copyFunc
copier function for items in the hash
deallocFunc
deallocation function in case of errors
Copy the hash table using copyFunc to copy payloads.

simplesect.para: the new table or NULL if a memory allocation failed.

parameterdescription.para: copier function for items in the hash

detaileddescription.para: Copy the hash table using copy to copy payloads.

simplesect.para: the new table or NULL if a memory allocation failed.

briefdescription.para: Query the number of elements in the hash table.

simplesect.para: the number of elements in the hash table or -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Scan the hash table and apply scan to each value.

parameterdescription.para: scanner function for items in the hash

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlHashTable *hash, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *name2, const xmlChar *name3, xmlHashScanner scan, void *data)
memberdef.name: xmlHashScan3

briefdescription.para: Scan the hash table and apply scan to each value matching (key, key2, key3) tuple.

detaileddescription.para: If one of the keys is null, the comparison is considered to match.

parameterdescription.para: scanner function for items in the hash

briefdescription.para: Scan the hash table and apply scan to each value.

parameterdescription.para: scanner function for items in the hash

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlHashTable *hash, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *name2, const xmlChar *name3, xmlHashScannerFull scan, void *data)
memberdef.name: xmlHashScanFull3

briefdescription.para: Scan the hash table and apply scan to each value matching (key, key2, key3) tuple.

detaileddescription.para: If one of the keys is null, the comparison is considered to match.

parameterdescription.para: scanner function for items in the hash

briefdescription.para: Chained hash tables.

detaileddescription.para: This module implements the hash table support used in various places in the library.

simplesect.para: See Copyright for the status of this software.
